summary: Completed the R0 read-only production/fixture/no-op audit matrix. The audit separates normal Web/Electron entrypoints from Storybook, Playwright, smoke, canary, and Node runner paths; records M3-M7 client command/save/load/time-control evidence; and distinguishes bottom-layer sim-core/protocol/save capability from missing client production wiring.

tests_run.result: Only allowed task paths changed before commit: project/audits/RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001.md, project/tasks/active/RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001.json, and project/messages/outbox/RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001__MSG-20260710-WRITER-REVIEW__systems_architect.json.
Task JSON validated in REVIEW state.
Active task list emitted; RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001 is REVIEW.
Ready task list emitted; no R1 task was created or started.

tests_run.command: node -e "const {execFileSync}=require('node:child_process'); const fs=require('node:fs'); const out=execFileSync('git',['status','--short','--untracked-files=all'],{encoding:'utf8'}); const files=out.split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean).map((line)=>line.slice(3).trim()).filter((file)=>file.endsWith('.json')); for (const file of files) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')); console.log('parsed '+files.length+' changed JSON file(s): '+files.join(', '));"
tests_run.result: Parsed the changed task JSON and writer handoff JSON.
Scope proof after staging listed only allowed paths: audit artifact, active task JSON, and writer handoff JSON.
Browser production Worker evidence is limited to host-hash canary; protocol message schemas and Node/test workers are present.
M3-M6 submitted command types/callbacks found; no M7 submitted command type found in the inspected client paths.

tests_run.command: rg -n "setSpeed|SimulationSpeed|auto-pause|auto pause|\b1x\b|\b2x\b|\b4x\b" apps/web/src packages/ui/src packages/client-core/src packages/protocol/src packages/sim-core/src apps/desktop/src apps/desktop/renderer
tests_run.result: No matching production time-control symbols found; exit 1 is expected for no matches.
Only local identifier false positives such as windowError/topology node were returned; no forbidden sim-core imports observed.

decisions: Kept the task in R0 audit scope only; no product code, tests, docs outside project/audits, or R1 implementation tasks were created.
Classified code existence separately from production runtime wiring; bottom capability is recorded as an integration gap only when the normal Web/Electron path did not call it.
Preserved the existing task threads field while moving task routing to qa_reviewer for REVIEW.
risks: This is a static and read-only audit; it does not replace a future R1 runtime integration test suite.
Negative rg evidence is scoped to the reviewed symbols and paths; reviewer should verify any newly introduced aliases before accepting later work.
Several high-risk gaps are integration gaps, not sim-core absence; R1 planning should avoid changing sim-core boundaries to solve client adapter wiring.
requested_action: Review the audit matrix and evidence classifications, confirm the write scope is limited to allowed R0 process artifacts, and either ACCEPT for lead routing or REQUEST_CHANGES back to systems_architect.
